description.en: Transfer EGLD, ESDT tokens, or NFTs on MultiversX from one wallet to another. Send any blockchain asset quickly and securely to any recipient address on the network.
description.de: Uebertrage EGLD, ESDT-Token oder NFTs auf MultiversX von einer Wallet zur anderen. Sende jedes Blockchain-Asset schnell und sicher an jede Empfaengeradresse im Netzwerk.

inputs.name: Blockchain
inputs.bot: The blockchain to transfer the asset from.

inputs.name: Receiver
inputs.bot: The blockchain wallet address of the receiver.

inputs.name: Asset
inputs.bot: Construct the asset output as follows: 'TOKEN-000000|5.5' (asset identifier|amount)
